caption: A man with white hair and a white beard is speaking from a wooden podium in a room with a green textured wall featuring a geometric pattern. He is wearing a light-colored, long-sleeved shirt under a white Nehru jacket. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. In the initial sequence, he gestures with his left hand while looking toward the side. He then shifts his gaze forward, resting his hands on the edges of the podium. As the scene progresses, he stands with his hands gripped on the sides of the podium, looking directly ahead. Finally, he turns his head back toward the side while maintaining his grip on the podium. Vertical gold and brown decorative pillars are visible in the background.
